content.text: Intake physical complete. Distinguishing features recorded. Everything is a distinguishing feature.
Pick exactly one trait at creation. Every trait is two-sided: the gift and the ledger line print together, and neither comes alone.

rows: Genius
Interface skills earn +1 LP per study period (The Twelve Skills).
A failed Check with real stakes leaves you Rattled (Conditions). The mind that won't stop, won't stop.
Margin-Born
Streetwise rolls at advantage in the margins.
Dome scanners always look twice.
Corp Crèche
One corp grants you Established-rank access (Professions Overview).
That corp's file on you is complete.
Heavy Frame
+2 HP.
Every armor's EV cap is −1 for you (Armor).
Rift-Touched
+1 on Checks resisting Charge effects.
Your Saturation floor starts at 5 (Charge & Saturation). You were always a little ahead of the bill.
Survivor
Start with one scar and its story; it carries no debuff (Scars).
Your clean death is already spent (The Staircase).
Old Hands
One technique free at creation (Techniques).
Stat training past 8 costs +25% (Stats & Growth). The body learned early and aged honestly.
Pack Animal
Beasts' fear Checks near you roll at advantage.
Their appetites notice you too: +25% upkeep.
Ledger Mind
Perfect recall of numbers, terms, and contracts.
Corps flag people who remember too well.
Restless
You may always claim your side's last activation slot — the closer (Turn, AP & Reactions).
Downtime rest restores one less.

content.label: DESIGN GAP
content.text: Restless's ledger line — "downtime rest restores one less" — restates the source exactly. The rebuild docs never define the downtime rest verb or the unit it restores.
Traits don't train, upgrade, or trade away — what you disclosed at intake is what the file says forever.
Thank you for disclosing. Your gift has been recorded as an asset. Your ledger line has been recorded as collateral.
